name: Insufficient Enrollment
description: The course did not reach the minimum number of enrolled students by the enrollment deadline.

name: Instructor Unavailable
description: The instructor cannot teach the course (illness, leave, departure, scheduling conflict).

name: Curriculum Change
description: The course was removed from or changed in the curriculum after the schedule was published.

name: Administrative Decision
description: The course is cancelled by administrative or departmental decision (resource constraints, restructuring).

name: Force Majeure
description: The course is cancelled due to circumstances beyond the seminary's control (natural disaster, public health, civil unrest).
